summary: Store fixes: watch_baselines is now keyed by (slug, service_id, provider) so per-provider watches keep independent baselines instead of colliding (empty provider = 'any'); and the UpsertBusiness conflict update wraps profile columns in COALESCE(NULLIF(excluded.col,''), businesses.col) so a partial child-resource sync no longer clobbers name/rating/address/phone/category with empty values (business_id guarded the same way; synced_at always refreshed). Added an explicit watch_baselines provider-column migration (drops the pre-provider table so the DDL rebuilds it with the provider-scoped PK).
reason: Running watch for provider A then B on the same service reused A's baseline. A `sync --resources services` flow sent a minimal business record whose conflict update overwrote the full profile with NULL/empty.
